name: Alert
description: A versatile alert component for displaying contextual feedback messages with multiple severity types, optional icons, and auto-dismiss functionality.
usage_guidelines: Use to display important messages, warnings, errors, or success notifications to users.
Choose the appropriate type (success, info, warning, danger) based on message severity.
Enable closable for dismissible alerts that users can manually close.
Set duration for auto-dismissing alerts (0 or undefined for persistent alerts).
Use showIcon to enhance visual communication of alert type.

closable.description: Enables a close button for manual dismissal.

customClose.description: Custom close button element to replace the default close button.

customIcon.description: Custom icon to display instead of the default status icon.

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in milliseconds. Set to 0 for persistent alerts.

onClose.description: Callback function triggered when alert is closed.

showIcon.description: Shows a status icon based on the alert type.

type.description: Visual style variant indicating message severity.

styling_info.visual_description: A rectangular container with rounded corners, colored background based on type (success-green, info-blue, warning-yellow, danger-red), with subtle border and appropriate text colors. Includes smooth fade-out animation when dismissed.

Do: Use appropriate type for message severity
Keep alert messages concise and actionable
Use showIcon for better visual communication
Set reasonable duration for auto-dismiss alerts
Dont: Don't use for critical errors that require user action (use Dialog instead)
Don't stack too many alerts simultaneously
Don't use very short durations that users can't read
